objective: Determine whether EGLImage wrapper reuse can be made safe for the Regular gate C++ MMAPI/VPI/NVENC path, instead of abandoning the route after the first tearing failure.
problem_statement: The accepted C++ EGLImage-wrapper path is visually correct. The first full wrapper reuse implementation reduced timing but caused visible block tearing. Stream-only reuse avoids tearing but has limited performance value. The route is not proven dead until safer reuse granularity and sync/lifetime variants are tested.

accepted_dependency.quality_reference: VPI Python allocated-image + explicit BGR8 correctness path
accepted_dependency.known_bad_candidate: single input/output VPI wrapper reused across changing EGLImages via vpiImageSetWrapper
accepted_dependency.safe_control: stream-only reuse: reuse VPI stream, recreate EGLImage wrappers per frame

frozen_variables: input clip for minimal root cause: regular_gate04_regular_8
do not change accepted_egl or fixed_bgr8 references
must_test_before_dead_end: explicit sync/lifetime variant around vpiImageSetWrapper and EGL unmap
documented VPI/MMAPI API limitation from local or official references if experiments remain ambiguous
success_criteria: no visible block tearing relative to accepted_egl on gate04 review frames
if gate04 succeeds, run all five Regular clips before promotion
dead_end_criteria: per-buffer-index wrapper reuse still tears under correct sync/lifetime handling
input-only and output-only reuse localize an unavoidable unsupported side
official/local VPI documentation confirms wrapper reuse over changing EGLImage/NvBuffer surfaces is unsupported for this usage
a minimal non-MMAPI or copied-sample reproducer shows the same VPI wrapper reuse tearing with no remaining sync/lifetime variable

validated_result.decision: Do not promote VPI EGLImage image-wrapper reuse in this MMAPI path.
validated_result.reason: single-wrapper, per-buffer-wrapper, input-only, output-only, persistent-mapping, and explicit-sync variants either produced visible block tearing or VPI/MMAPI errors. Stream-only reuse was safe, which localizes the risk to image-wrapper reuse rather than VPI stream reuse.
validated_result.safe_control: reuse VPI stream only and recreate EGLImage image wrappers per frame

forbidden_claims: wrapper reuse route is dead before must_test_before_dead_end is covered
